benefits_headline: Why Most Men Over 40 Feel Like Shadows of Themselves
benefits_paragraphs: After 40, your body's natural testosterone production begins to decline — often by 1-2% per year. That means by 50, you could have 10-20% less than you had at 25. And the effects go way beyond the bedroom.
Low energy. Brain fog. Weight gain. Reduced muscle mass. Weakened libido. Feeling like you're just going through the motions — when you used to feel alive and unstoppable.

VapoFil changes this. Our formula combines 6 clinically studied ingredients that target the root cause of male decline — not just masking symptoms, but restoring your body's natural vitality from the inside out.
urgency_text: 65% off available — but stock is limited. Don't wait.

science_headline: How It Works: The 3-Step Male Vitality Reset
science_subheadline: VapoFil doesn't just mask symptoms — it targets the root causes of male decline.

science_steps.text: Tongkat Ali and Boron work together to release testosterone from SHBG — the protein that traps it. More free testosterone = more energy, strength, and drive.
Horny Goat Weed boosts nitric oxide production, improving circulation throughout your body — especially where it matters most.
Sarsaparilla and Nettle Leaf provide adaptogenic support, regulating hormones naturally without the crash of stimulants.

science_result: The result: You feel the difference in days. The transformation compounds over weeks.

faq_headline: Everything You Need to Know Before You Order

faq_items.question: Will this actually work for me?
faq_items.answer: The ingredients in VapoFil (Tongkat Ali, Horny Goat Weed, Boron, and others) have been studied extensively for their effects on male vitality. Thousands of men over 40 have experienced real results. The key is consistency — take it daily for 3-4 weeks.

faq_items.question: Is it safe? Are there any side effects?
faq_items.answer: VapoFil is 100% natural, stimulant-free, and made in an FDA-registered, GMP-certified facility in the USA. No harsh side effects. If you have a medical condition, consult your doctor first.

faq_items.question: How do I take it?
faq_items.answer: Just 2 capsules in the morning with water. Most men notice improvements in energy and mood within the first week. For full effects, give it 3-4 weeks.

faq_items.question: What if it doesn't work for me?
faq_items.answer: 60-day unconditional guarantee. Full refund, no questions asked. You can even keep the bottles.

faq_items.question: Is this a subscription?
faq_items.answer: One-time purchase only. No hidden subscriptions, no auto-shipments, no surprises.

faq_items.question: Why is the 6-bottle kit the most popular?
faq_items.answer: Male vitality takes a consistent 90-day commitment. The 6-bottle kit offers the biggest savings (65% off) and free shipping — the best value by far.
